ai_chatbots.heading: Our AI Chatbot Development Process
ai_chatbots.description: Our chatbot development process is structured, predictable, and designed to minimise risk.

steps.title: Use Case & Conversation Strategy
steps.description: We define business objectives, user intent, success metrics, and conversation scope.

steps.title: Conversation Design & Flow Mapping
steps.description: We design dialogue logic, fallback handling, tone, and escalation paths.

steps.title: AI & NLP Implementation
steps.description: We implement natural language understanding, intent classification, and response logic using production-grade AI frameworks.

steps.title: Integration & Testing
steps.description: Chatbots are integrated with CRMs, databases, APIs, and support tools, then tested under real usage conditions.

steps.title: Deployment & Continuous Optimisation
steps.description: Post-launch, we monitor performance, retrain models, and optimise conversations based on real interaction data.

llm_development.heading: Our LLM Development Process
llm_development.description: Our process is designed to reduce AI risk and ensure predictable, enterprise-grade delivery.

steps.title: Use Case & Data Assessment
steps.description: We define business objectives, evaluate data readiness, and identify where LLMs provide measurable value.

steps.title: Model Strategy & Architecture
steps.description: We select the appropriate base model, deployment approach, and security model based on accuracy, cost, and compliance needs.

steps.title: Training & Fine-Tuning
steps.description: We train or fine-tune the model using clean, structured datasets and domain-specific prompts.

steps.title: Integration & Deployment
steps.description: The LLM is integrated with internal systems, APIs, and workflows, then deployed in a controlled production environment.

steps.title: Monitoring & Continuous Improvement
steps.description: We track accuracy, latency, usage costs, and outcomes, refining the model as requirements evolve.

automation_workflows.heading: Our Automation Delivery Process
automation_workflows.description: We follow the same delivery discipline used across all Devtrios engineering services.

steps.title: Process Discovery & Mapping
steps.description: We map existing workflows, identify bottlenecks, failure points, and automation opportunities, and define success metrics.

steps.title: Automation Architecture Design
steps.description: We design the automation logic, integration points, security controls, and scalability model before any implementation begins.

steps.title: Implementation & Integration
steps.description: Workflows are built, tested, and integrated with existing systems using secure, maintainable architectures.

steps.title: Validation & Testing
steps.description: We test workflows for accuracy, failure handling, edge cases, and performance under load.

steps.title: Deployment & Continuous Improvement
steps.description: Automation is deployed with monitoring in place. We refine workflows as usage grows and requirements change.

generative_ai.heading: Our Approach to Generative AI Engineering
generative_ai.description: We treat Generative AI as a production system, not a feature.

steps.title: 1. Strategy & Use Case Definition
steps.description: We identify where Generative AI creates operational or commercial value, not where it merely sounds impressive.

steps.title: 2. Data & Knowledge Architecture
steps.description: We design how your data, documents, and systems feed into the model to ensure accuracy, traceability, and control.

steps.title: 3. Model Selection & Design
steps.description: We select and configure the right models for your use case, balancing performance, cost, and security.

steps.title: 4. Development & Integration
steps.description: We build the Generative AI system into your applications, workflows, or platforms using robust engineering practices.

steps.title: 5. Testing, Guardrails & Optimisation
steps.description: We validate outputs, apply safeguards, and continuously optimise performance to ensure reliable, predictable results.
